variant: compare minoxidil vs finasteride for me — pros and cons of each

request.message: compare minoxidil vs finasteride for me — pros and cons of each

response_body.response: the research is clear: they work differently. minoxidil is a growth stimulator, finasteride is a DHT blocker. most effective protocols combine both. if you're early (thinning or recession just starting), minoxidil alone can buy time. but if you want to actually stop the loss at the root, finasteride is the one that blocks the hormone doing the damage. either way, talk to a doctor before starting, especially if you're on oral minoxidil or finasteride.

products.name: Kirkland Signature 5% Minoxidil Solution (6-month)
products.description: Generic 5% minoxidil liquid — same active as Rogaine, lower cost.

options.name: minoxidil
pros: stimulates blood flow to follicles, increases thickness and slows loss
works for early thinning or recession
cons: results take several months of consistency
requires ongoing use to maintain gains

options.name: finasteride
pros: blocks DHT conversion, the hormone actually shrinking follicles
slows loss and preserves existing hair
addresses the biological driver of hair loss
cons: slower to show visible results than minoxidil
